title: 17 Ideal Pre-Crash Recovery December Divi-Dogs
text: September-October, 2023, Barron's, Bloomberg, and Fortune analysts and reporters combined to list five sets of stocks sorted as “Recovery Bets.” Those five articles revealed 53 equities, with 42 paying-dividends. These recovery lists focus on financial services, healthcare, and real estate sectors by Barron's along with selected “change the world” stocks from Fortune and ten to watch from Bloomberg.

title: UDR: Short-Term Ugly, Long-Term Beautiful
text: UDR's stock has fallen 14% YTD, underperforming its coastal apartment REIT peers as investors are concerned about its sunbelt exposure in the face of elevated supply. The market is concerned about UDR's exposure to sunbelt markets, but I see this headwind becoming a tailwind as new supply is set to plummet once we get beyond 2024. UDR trades at a significant discount to my NAV estimate and I believe it is priced to deliver 17% annualized returns over the medium term.

title: Major landlords, RealPage sued in DC for alleged rent fixing scheme
text: D.C. Attorney General Brian Schwalb announced a lawsuit against 14 landlords in the district and RealPage for allegedly illegally raising rent prices.
